query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'contacts' AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('archived_at', 'isa_status', 'archivedAt', 'isaStatus') ORDER BY COLUMN_NAME;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2stQR1ySY2c4Vud.1719b3382959 --database RGtcxHR8RPxZsqyxZLCcuq --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'contacts' AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('archived_at', 'isa_status', 'archivedAt', 'isaStatus') ORDER BY COLUMN_NAME;
